title: Shimelle!
excerpt: Absolutely loving Shimelle's first signature collection with American Crafts! As you can see, I'm all about spreading out the products and making a happy mess while creating. I'm also not opposed to using pink on my pages with Jack on…
body: Absolutely loving Shimelle's first signature collection with American Crafts! As you can see, I'm all about spreading out the products and making a happy mess while creating. I'm also not opposed to using pink on my pages with Jack on them. Loving the gold hearts and mix of beautiful fonts and patterns.
